commonDescriptions.description:
Turn down the world's noise with the long-lasting noise cancellation performance. Featuring Dual Noise Sensor technology and an Integrated Processor V1, the WH-CH720N allows you to fully immerse yourself in music without any distractions. Ergonomically designed to be lightweight, comfortable, and with up to 35 hours of battery life, you’ll almost forget you’re wearing it.

Product Overview

  • Brand: Sony
  • Color: Black
  • Ear Placement: Over Ear
  • Form Factor: Over Ear
  • Impedance: 325 Ohms

Product Features

  • SONY’S LIGHTEST WIRELESS NOISE CANCELING HEADBAND EVER: Weighing just 192g, our lightest overhead wireless headphones with Noise Canceling yet, for incredible comfort without compromising on technology.
  • DUAL NOISE SENSOR TECHNOLOGY: Take noise canceling to the next level with Sony’s Integrated Processor V1, so you can fully immerse yourself in the music.
  • ALL DAY COMFORT: Super comfortable and lightweight design.
  • SMART FEATURES: Adjustable Ambient Sound mode and Adaptive Sound control features tailors sound to suit the environment around you.
  • LONG BATTERY LIFE: Up to 35-hour battery life with quick charging (3 min charge for up to 1 hour of playback).(USB Type-C Cable included
  • SUPERB SOUND: Enjoy natural vocals, crystal clear sound and balanced tuning thanks to the Integrated Processor V1 and Digital Sound Enhancement Engine (DSEE), producing a high-quality sound exactly as the artists intended.
  • CRYSTAL CLEAR HANDS FREE CALLING: Precise Voice Pickup Technology uses beamforming microphones pick up voices clearly and accurately.
  • MULTIPOINT CONNECTION: Quickly switch between two devices at once.
  • GIVE YOUR MUSIC A BOOST: Boost the quality of compressed music files and enjoy streaming music with high quality sound through DSEE.

result.description:
MumuJapan
Authentic items from Japan • Fast & Safe Shipping

Description

Primasole 15mm Mint Green Yoga Mat - Thick, Wide, Non-Slip for Pilates & Exercise
Premium NBR Fitness Mat with Carrying Strap & Mesh Case - Japan Import

Elevate your home fitness routine with the Primasole 15mm Mint Green Yoga Mat, a premium Japan-sourced exercise mat designed for comfort and stability. This extra-thick mat provides superior cushioning, effectively absorbing the hardness and coldness of the floor, making it ideal for yoga, Pilates, stretching, strength training, and general workouts. Its high-density NBR material offers a perfect balance of softness and support, ensuring a stable foundation without excessive sinking.

Engineered for performance, the Primasole mat features a non-slip embossed surface that keeps your hands and feet secure during poses and dynamic movements. The generous 183cm x 61cm size accommodates users of all heights, while its water-repellent surface allows for easy cleaning with a quick wipe. Lightweight and portable, it comes complete with a storage band and mesh carrying case, making it convenient for both home use and on-the-go training sessions.

  • Brand: Primasole
  • Product Name: Yoga Mat 15mm
  • Color: Mint Green
  • Thickness: 15mm
  • Material: NBR (Nitrile Butadiene Rubber)
  • Dimensions: 183cm (Length) x 61cm (Width)
  • Weight: 1250g
  • Condition: Brand New
  • Country of Origin: Japan

Key Features

  • Extra-thick 15mm cushioning for joint protection and comfort
  • High-density NBR material for optimal support and stability
  • Non-slip embossed surface for enhanced grip during exercises
  • Wide 183cm x 61cm size suitable for various body types
  • Water-repellent and easy-to-clean for daily hygiene
  • Lightweight design with included storage band and mesh carrying case
  • Versatile for yoga, Pilates, stretching, strength training, HIIT, and more

💡 Important Note for U.S. Buyers

Q: Why might your total price seem higher than other stores?

A: Because our price is final and all-inclusive. We use DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping, as recommended by eBay, the safest method compliant with U.S. customs.

  • ✅ No Hidden Costs: Your price includes all import duties and taxes. No surprise fees upon delivery.
  • ✅ Faster & More Secure: Avoids the customs delays and risks common with cheaper, non-compliant shipping methods.

Shipping & Policies

Shipping Information

  • Handling Time: Ships within 2–7 business days (excludes weekends & Japanese holidays).
  • Address Confirmation: Please ensure your shipping address is correct at checkout. It cannot be changed after dispatch.
  • Tracking Included: All shipments include a tracking number.

To United States

Shipping is DDP (Delivered Duty Paid). All duties and taxes are prepaid.

  • Expedited: 2–5 business days via SpeedPAK.
  • Economy: 8–15 business days via SpeedPAK.

To Other Countries

Shipping is DDU (Delivered Duty Unpaid). Buyer is responsible for import duties/taxes.

  • Expedited: 2–7 business days via FedEx.
  • Economy: 7–21 business days via Japan Post.

Returns

We offer a 30-day return policy. Items must be returned in their original condition. For buyer-initiated returns, the buyer may be responsible for return shipping costs. If an item arrives damaged, please contact us immediately with photos of the package and item.

About MumuJapan

Based in Japan, we are dedicated to bringing you authentic Japanese products. We pride ourselves on our meticulous packaging and responsive customer service. Have a question or a special request? Feel free to message us anytime!

💡 More Great Items Available!

👉 Visit Our eBay Store

  • 💡 Portable Party Ready: Compact black ABS body (22.8×9.4×7.5 inches) with built-in rechargeable battery providing 1-2 hours of continuous playback at max volume

  • ⚡ Quick Charging: DC5V 1A charging with clear LED indicators (red light during charging, turns off when fully charged in 3-5 hours)

Specification

  • Bluetooth Model: MPX-8080

FREE SAME BUSINESS DAY MONDAY- FRIDAY SHIPPING FROM USA.
 
All orders and payments received before 4PM EST (1PM PST) will be shipped the same business day.
 
No shipping on Weekends or US Public Holidays.

1. All payments must be prepaid before shipping.

(1) We stand behind our items and offer 60 days warranty. All items are in brand new condition unless specified otherwise elsewhere in the description.

(2) All returns - defective or otherwise - have to be preauthorized. Please contact us to get an authorization and returning address before sending the item back. If an item is returned because of an undeliverable shipping address, buyer agrees to pay the cost for re-shipment.

(3) Please note that If the return/replacement is not a result of our mistake (not defective or wrong item), the buyer is responsible for return shipping, as well as a 20 percent restocking fee.

(4) Replacement or refund will be made upon receipt of the returned item. If you do not want to wait for the replacement, you can just reorder one and then send the first one back for a refund.

commonDescriptions.description:
High quality sound and comfortable, all-day listening in a wireless headphone. The WH-CH520 have an ultra-long battery life of up to 50 hours and a 3-minute quick charge gives you up to 1.5 hours of audio playback.

Product Overview

  • Brand: Sony
  • Color: Blue
  • Ear Placement: On Ear
  • Form Factor: On Ear
  • Impedance: 32 Ohms

Product Features

  • LONG BATTERY LIFE: With up to 50-hour battery life and quick charging, you’ll have enough power for multi-day road trips and long festival weekends.(USB Type-C Cable included)
  • HIGH QUALITY SOUND: Great sound quality customizable to your music preference with EQ Custom on the Sony | Headphones Connect App.
  • LIGHT & COMFORTABLE: The lightweight build and swivel earcups gently slip on and off, while the adjustable headband, cushion and soft ear pads give you all-day comfort.
  • CRYSTAL CLEAR CALLS: A built-in microphone provides you with hands-free calling. No need to even take your phone from your pocket.
  • MULTIPOINT CONNECTION: Quickly switch between two devices at once.
  • AVAILABLE IN SIX COLORS: With Black, Blue, White, Pink, Yellow and Cappuccino to choose from, find the color that suits you best.
  • GIVE YOUR MUSIC A BOOST: Boost the quality of compressed music files and enjoy streaming music with high quality sound through DSEE.
  • FIND YOUR HEADPHONES WITH FAST PAIR: Easily find your missing headphones by sound or check their last known location in Google’s Find My Device app on your smartphone.
  • EASY CONNECTION TO YOUR PC: Swift Pair makes it quick and easy to pair your headphones with your Windows 10 computer via Bluetooth.
